chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1653 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on CMA 6492/25 2.For orders on o/objections 3.For orders on CMA 6493/25 4.For hearing of main case 30-09-2025 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for the petitioner. **** 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2to4. Counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
